scripts.test: bun run --filter '@gerpain/*' test && bun run --filter gerpain test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@gerpain/*' typecheck && bun run --filter gerpain typecheck
scripts.db:reset: bash scripts/db-init-local.sh && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
scripts.db:reset:docker: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && bun run db:wait && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
